title: Dua Lipa and Callum Turner Celebrate Second Wedding Ceremony in Sicily
summary: The couple first tied the knot during an intimate ceremony in London in May.
body: Dua Lipa and Callum Turner have celebrated their love with a second wedding ceremony. The British pop star, 30, and Fantastic Beasts actor, 36, reportedly exchanged vows again during a lavish ceremony in Palermo, Sicily, on Saturday (June 6), according to Vanity Fair . Related Dua Lipa & Callum Turner’s Relationship Timeline Dua Lipa and Callum Turner Marry in Intimate London Ceremony Dua Lipa Shares Photos From Intimate Wedding to Callum Turner The star-studded event was held at Villa Valguarnera, an 18th-century mansion, and reportedly welcomed around 300 guests. The newlyweds were serenaded by Elton John , who performed his classic hit “Your Song” while playing the piano. Lipa and John previously collaborated on “Cold Heart,” whose PNAU remix reached No. 7 on the Billboard Hot 100 in 2021. The couple’s Sicilian celebration drew an impressive guest list, including Donatella Versace, Joe Alwyn, Olivia Dean, Charli XCX and her husband, The 1975 drummer George Daniel. Also in attendance were Tame Impala frontman Kevin Parker and his wife, Sophie Parker, as well as Mark Ronson and his wife, Grace Gummer. Music throughout the fes…
